case_title: ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC. VS. ONE TIMBERLAKE INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ONE TIMBERLAKE INC. $1,444.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,509.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC.

DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY BARBARA FREEBERG--BOOK KEEPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
